I can schedule that — quick status and a couple questions before I create the event.

Status for 2024-05-19:
- 10:00–11:00 — Project Kick-off (busy)
- 11:00–11:30 — One-on-One with Manager (busy)
So 10:00 is not available.

Suggested alternative 1-hour slots on 2024-05-19 (earliest first):
- 09:00–10:00
- 11:30–12:30 (earliest one-hour slot after existing events)
- 12:00–13:00
- 13:00–14:00
- 14:00–15:00
(If you prefer a different time that day, tell me and I’ll check availability.)

Before I create the event I need two quick details:
1) Which time do you want (pick one of the options above or say “find next available one-hour slot”)?  
2) Who should be invited (email addresses or “no participants”)?  
3) Event title and location (or say “I’ll pick a title/location”) — if you don’t specify, I’ll use a default.  
4) Short description to include (suggested default below).

Suggested default title and description:
- Title: Follow-up Meeting
- Description: Follow-up to review action items and next steps from the kick-off.

Tell me the choices for 1–3 (or say “use suggested defaults and invite no one”), and I’ll create the one-hour event.
